summary: Solid soundboard capture of the second set (first set missing) with a strong Dead performance that outshines Dylan.
review: The recording delivers a clean soundboard mix of the second set, though listeners miss the first set entirely. Reviewers note the band’s playing was so compelling that even Bob Dylan would have sounded better listening to them, indicating a high‑energy performance despite the incomplete show.

ai_rating.rationale: One positive 4‑star review highlights strong musical performance and suggests decent soundboard quality, but the lack of multiple reviews limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear soundboard mix; primary issue is that only the second set is present, making the recording incomplete.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set captured well; reviewers praise overall band energy despite missing first set.
